linearization: param(theta) = nominal + max(theta,0)*(Up - nominal) - max(-theta,0)*(nominal - Down)
comment: FranksVals NP model param map (LatticeNoConstraintsFranks branch in rabbit_theory_helper.py). Centrals and template ranges differ from the AN LatticeNoConstraints map: tanh_2 on both sides; lambda_4_nu and lambda_inf_nu are fixed (no nuisance) so not listed here. No helper_internal_kfactor (the new branch does not apply scale=10). 2026-05-19.

important_conventions.CS_side_convention: Frank's CS gamma kernel uses lambda_2_nu = 0.15 +/- 0.1 (templates lambda2_nu0.05 / lambda2_nu0.25). lambda_4_nu = 0 and lambda_inf_nu = 2 are FIXED (no template), so no scetlibNPgammaLambda4 / scetlibNPgammaLambdaInf nuisances in this map.
important_conventions.TMD_side_convention: Frank's TMD BC uses lambda_2 = 0.4 +0.6/-0.4 (templates lambda20.0 / lambda21.0) and lambda_4 = 0.4 +0.6/-0.4 (templates lambda40.0 / lambda41.0), both ASYMMETRIC. delta_lambda2 unchanged from prior config (templates +/-0.02 around 0).
important_conventions.no_internal_scale_10: LatticeNoConstraintsFranks does NOT apply helper internal kfactor=10 on the CS side (unlike the original LatticeNoConstraints). Effective kfactor = 1 with no --scaleParams override.

chargeVgenNP0scetlibNPZlambda2.convention: Standard: Up = larger physical value (asymmetric: d_up=0.6, d_dn=0.4)

chargeVgenNP0scetlibNPZdelta_lambda2.convention: Standard: Up = larger physical value. NOMINAL = 0.

chargeVgenNP0scetlibNPZlambda4.convention: Standard: Up = larger physical value (asymmetric: d_up=0.6, d_dn=0.4)
